item.title: .@NASA and @SpaceX are targeting the launch of Dragon's next cargo mission for 7:16pm ET on May 12 t...
item.author: @Space_Station

item.title: 明天回东京，睡前刷手机，心里突然冒出几个新产品的想法，上个产品 yuragi FM 做了一些基础的关于音视频 AIGC 的想法，接下来我打算把舞蹈和声乐方面的主题也融入到新产品里去。
item.author: @turingou

item.title: Enter Lenny's Buildathon: https://t.co/jDRhOpEAse https://t.co/sDbOTuAT4c
item.author: @lennysan

item.title:
Announcing the Lenny's Newsletter x @Replit Buildathon
Build something awesome with my podcast and ...
item.description:
Announcing the Lenny's Newsletter x @Replit Buildathon
Build something awesome with my podcast and newsletter data using Replit, and win fabulous prizes: 🔸 1:1 career coaching session with @amasad 🔸 $5,000 in free Replit credits 🔸 A free year of Lenny's Newsletter
This is the excuse you've been waiting for to build with AI.
Learn more and enter the thread below.
P.S. The first 200 joiners get a free month of Replit Core.
--- @lennysan | ❤️ 4 | 🔁 0 | 💬 2 | 👁 244
item.author: @lennysan

item.title:
We're helping small businesses level up this National Small Business Week! 🚀
We’re giving U.S. smal...
item.description:
We're helping small businesses level up this National Small Business Week! 🚀
We’re giving U.S. small businesses and their teams no-cost access to our best AI tools and training to help your team to streamline daily tasks, sharpen your strategy, and get more done:
🎓 Google AI Professional Certificate ✨ 3 months of Google AI Pro 💼 3 months of Google Workspace Business Standard
--- @Google | ❤️ 54 | 🔁 12 | 💬 17 | 👁 11335
item.author: @Google

item.title: AFAIK BD doesn’t use RL for their robots.

item.title: He should just convert it into a floating datacenter.

item.title:
Precisely what I have been saying since day 1: the challenge in generative AI is reliability.
That ...
item.description:
Precisely what I have been saying since day 1: the challenge in generative AI is reliability.
That was the challenge, and still is.
--- @GaryMarcus | ❤️ 18 | 🔁 1 | 💬 6 | 👁 2366
item.author: @GaryMarcus
